name: SSC CGL (Combined Graduate Level Examination)
description: Recruitment exam conducted by the Staff Selection Commission for various Group B and Group C posts in central government ministries and departments.

name: IBPS PO / Clerk Recruitment
description: Common recruitment process by the Institute of Banking Personnel Selection for Probationary Officer and Clerk posts in public sector banks.

name: Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) Group D / NTPC
description: Recruitment for technician, trackman, helper, and non-technical popular categories posts across Indian Railways zones.

name: Anganwadi Worker / Helper
description: Community-level posts under the Integrated Child Development Services (ICDS) scheme to support child nutrition, health, and pre-school education.

name: Andhra Pradesh Police Constable Recruitment
description: Recruitment for Police Constable (Civil/AR) posts in Andhra Pradesh conducted by the State Level Police Recruitment Board.
